scope.target: External Fable 5 v0.4.2 review intake and repo-native evidence normalization
constraints: Re-run material claims against the pinned repository commit
Do not treat external prose as normative repository truth
non_goals: Require the external reviewer to follow repository assessment templates
Perform remediation during the auditor pass

steps: Read the complete external review package
Create ASM-20260720-001 with stable finding IDs
Register both the raw source and formal assessment
execution.last_completed_step: Created the final intake assessment and mapped all seven source findings.
execution.next_action: Use ASM-20260720-001 stable finding IDs in R042005-002 and R042005-003.

results.summary: Preserved the independent Fable 5 review as raw external evidence and normalized its confirmed findings into a repo-native assessment.
tests_run: repository-native reproduction commands documented in ASM-20260720-001
results.residual_risk: External review inputs remain evidence rather than normative truth until normalized.
